{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231700052C47655920B1092EF4AB"}"},"total":1023},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7441271436608815934","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了评价都是挺好的，就看了看，咋说呢，看着有点不舒服，说不上来的感觉，有一种弃之可惜但又不是食之无味的感觉，，文中剧情设定我感觉还是不错的，就是人设感官不太好，可能是看惯了主文（斩神）的原因，如果是没看过的，第一次看这个文应该会好一点，我很喜欢作者大大的第六个特殊小队这个设定，还有龙虎山老天师，狐妖，苗疆圣女，一人这些都挺好的，很体现了中华文化的博大精深，可能也是因为串的有点多，没有融合的太好，有就有点可惜了人物设定不符合我的口味了，如果没看过斩神原文的姐妹倒是可以看看，剧情还是不错的，作者大大继续加油呀，希望你能写出更好小说～","text_exts":[{"e":144,"s":141,"text":"龙虎山","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E8%99%8E%E5%B1%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774256405092EF4AB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227441271436608815934%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227250477431025306639%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E8%99%8E%E5%B1%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":155,"s":151,"text":"苗疆圣女","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%8B%97%E7%96%86%E5%9C%A3%E5%A5%B3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774256405092EF4AB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227441271436608815934%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227250477431025306639%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%8B%97%E7%96%86%E5%9C%A3%E5%A5%B3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732566026,"group_id":"7250477431025306639","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"余音尽处，笙歌犹在。人生这一篇章，依旧未完待 七年前盖亚用【湿婆怨】毁灭了整个苍南，只留下了两个孩子生还（加了一个）。
林七夜的【凡尘神域】让整个苍南城重获新生，因此他不能离开苍南。
张太平的【绝地天通】虽然让他在【湿婆怨】下保住了性命，但因为其破坏神域的特性而不得不离开苍南……
主角前期不无敌，年纪小性格有点弱，但会因为经历的越来越多，变得心狠手辣成为半反派。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dccc83fbab6ad5e1c07d98743c1a19c7","author":"熵道之","author_id":"","book_id":"7250477431025306639","book_name":"斩神：大夏境内神明禁行","book_short_name":"斩神黄昏小队","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203850","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7250625996519375412","read_count":"17699","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1280208"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"515","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,开局,同人,斩神,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ca70fe9bfb86f5b504e1981567d04b68~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440405&x-signature=amQyblTWeJeEYU6s7eQVTSkA2L4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52687258233","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231700052C47655920B1092EF4AB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5394},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1732573816,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7440715104059032345","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"神作，我愿称此为唯一真神
首先他一点都不吸主角的血，本书的主角团和林7夜他们属于两个完全不同的团队，
并且书的主角团每个人都有很详细的属于自己的故事对他们个性的塑造十分完善。
本书不是获得什么禁区就牛逼哄哄无敌的，能感觉到主角一点点成长，一点点变强，逻辑也很清晰。不像大多数小说一样开局得到了什么禁虚后面又搞了一些乱七八糟的情绪往他身上塞，导致后面战力崩坏。
而且这本书联动了好多其他动漫里的故事线，但是都把他们的背景给重塑了一遍，并不会让你感觉违和相反在故事中穿插的十分融洽。
目前我看到了160章，我看的百分之95的斩神同人文都会弃坑，有的可能是战力崩坏，或者逻辑出现了漏洞，亦是直接无敌等等等等的，问题会让我不想看下去，但这本书让我觉得这是那二刷的
